---
title: "Initial_Figures"
author: "Elizabeth Miles-Flynn"
date: "2026-03-18"
output: pdf_document
---

## Set Up
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(here)

getwd()
here()

Data_Clean <- read.csv(file = here("Initial Figures/SlaySMilesFlynnESuEData_Cleaned.csv"),
                      stringsAsFactors = TRUE)
Data_Clean$Date <- ymd(Data_Clean$Date)

Data_Clean1 <- Data_Clean %>%
  mutate(
    month = factor(
      month(Date),
      levels = 1:12,
      labels = month.abb,
      ordered = TRUE),
      Year = year(Date))

Data_Clean1 <- Data_Clean1 %>%
  mutate(
    Status = case_when(
      month %in% c("Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun") ~ "Before",
      month %in% c("Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec") ~ "After"))

TotalP_fig1 <- ggplot(Data_Clean1, aes(x = ))
trout_fig2 <- ggplot(trout_recapture_data, 
                          aes(x = length_1_mm)) +
  geom_histogram() +
    facet_wrap(~year) +
  labs(x = "Snout-to-Fork Length (mm)",
       y = "Trout Count",
       title = "Distribution of Cutthroat Trout Lengths By Year",
       caption = "Figure 2: Cutthroat Trout length in Mack Creek for different 
       years (captured and tagged in 2014; recaptured in 2015). Dataset 
       collected by H.J. Andrews Long Term Ecological Research program within 
       the Mack Creek watershed in Oregon") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```
